task: use the stick to drag the cube onto the green target
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A green cube, a purple cube, a gray cube, a pink cube, a green target, and a stick lie on a brown surface. The cubes are small and rigid; the target is a flat green square. The stick is a long, thin object. STRATEGY - First, grasp the stick. Then, use the stick to push the purple cube onto the green target. The purple cube is the only cube that can be directly pushed onto the target. Failure modes include not grasping the stick, misaligning the push, or pushing the wrong cube. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the stick for grasping; Step 2 grasp the stick; Step 3 push the purple cube onto the target using the stick.
Goal: on(purple_cube, green_target)
Scene: green_cube, purple_cube, gray_cube, pink_cube, green_target, stick
Step 1: reach(stick)
  affordance_region: the body of the stick
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, stick, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, stick) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(stick)
  affordance_region: the body of the stick
  contact: holding(stick) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(stick)
Step 3: push(purple_cube -> green_target)
  affordance_region: the body of the purple cube
  contact: surface_contact(purple_cube, green_target) [completion]; released(stick) [completion]
  spatial: above(purple_cube, green_target, 0.05) [completion]
  direction: push_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: surface_contact(purple_cube, green_target) AND released(stick)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the purple cube
